此后赵华行走江湖，再学会了更厉害的神功，江湖上出现了一个邪恶的武林门派圣令教，许多武林高手惨遭杀害。江湖上一提到圣令教，闻风声变。赵华和一些武林高手循着蛛丝马迹，经过一番艰难的追踪，找到了圣令教的老巢，最终消灭了圣令教，武林恢复回了原来的平静。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/df634e3de9ab86855b0dbeaf561a0e95","author":"天涯不速之客","author_id":"","book_id":"7005407864709712904","book_name":"一柄长剑闯天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#8890a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7006223473567760927","read_count":"252","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1070836"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"472","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,武侠,剑道","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/3ed4fef71a468641c600c5af720f7430~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429637&x-signature=CJCquJsg4dnGsFtx4%2FkUSijAIvI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4322855e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323140037991E6DE475C1D5029476"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"sco
